# Third-party vendored dependencies

All runtime dependencies are bundled locally so the hub works offline and without CDN.

## Vendor path note

The source vendored files live under `public/vendor/`. Vite copies this directory to `dist/vendor/` during build, so `index.html` references `vendor/<file>` (relative to the build root). Do not place vendored files at the project root `vendor/`; keep them in `public/vendor/` so they are emitted into `dist/` unchanged.

| File | Package | Version | License | Source | SHA-256 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|--------|---------|
| xlsx.full.min.js | xlsx | 0.18.5 | Apache-2.0 | https://sheetjs.com/ | `c9506197caf809a075b6dee1da0d36fb19da7158ffe8a88e7b0c96c5d8623c99` |
| chart.umd.min.js | chart.js | 4.5.1 | MIT | https://www.chartjs.org/ | `48444a82d4edcb5bec0f1965faacdde18d9c17db3063d042abada2f705c9f54a` |
| lucide-sprite.svg | lucide-static | 0.400.0 | ISC | https://lucide.dev/ | `5aa0fa82e04e70a8042e422172d684e96d1aa33a98fe42e2538962a32229e14b` |

## Dependency version note

`package.json` declares caret ranges for reproducible installs (e.g. `chart.js: ^4.4.3`). The versions recorded above are the exact resolved versions present in `node_modules/` at the time `npm run vendor` was run. Re-run `npm run vendor` after `npm update` or `npm install` to refresh both the files and this table.

Generated by `npm run vendor`.
